character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Patched up the narrator's cut and pulled their ears, consulted with the squire and the doctor on the captain's condition, and went to see Ben Gunn.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Suffered grievous wounds but was expected to recover, with his shoulder-blade broken and lung damaged. Required rest and care.

character_dossiers.name: Squire
character_dossiers.biography: Assisted the captain with bandages and consulted with the doctor on his condition.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Was shot at the loophole and later died under the doctor's knife.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Survived the mutiny with severe wounds but was expected to recover.

character_dossiers.name: Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Shot the captain in the shoulder-blade and was identified as the shooter.

character_dossiers.name: Job
character_dossiers.biography: Shot the captain in the calf and was identified as the shooter.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Expressed shock at Dr. Livesey's actions and planned to leave the enclosure.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Hid his boat on the island, as noted by the narrator's observations.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Was seen in the gig alongside the red cap man, overseeing the anchorage.

character_dossiers.name: the red cap man
character_dossiers.biography: Was observed on the gig with Silver, identified by the narrator as a mutineer.
